hooks.command: $j=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if($j -match 'publish\.ps1'){'{"systemMessage":"Version check: assess whether a semver bump is needed (new feature -> minor, fix -> patch, breaking -> major) and confirm the new version with the user BEFORE publishing.","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"About to run publish.ps1. Per the version-bump-workflow memory: classify changes since the last published version and ASK the user to confirm the version before publishing the executables."}}'}
